faqSection.noResults: No matching questions found. Try the AI Chatbot!

items.question: What is MedFinder?
items.answer: MedFinder is an AI-powered healthcare platform that helps patients find hospitals and pharmacies, check drug availability, and navigate to medical facilities using real-time routing.

items.question: How do I find a specific drug?
items.answer: Use the search bar on the home page or search results page. Filter by 'Pharmacy' and type the drug name to see which verified pharmacies have it in stock.

items.question: How do I register my hospital?
items.answer: Click on the 'Join as Hospital' button in the provider section, fill out the registration form with your license details, and wait for admin verification.

items.question: Does the map show real-time traffic?
items.answer: Yes, our navigation system uses real-time data to provide the fastest routes to your selected healthcare facility.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.introduction: Welcome to MedFinder. This platform helps users locate hospitals and pharmacies, check medicine availability, and communicate through an AI-powered chatbot.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using this system, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

use.title: 2. Use of the Platform
use.content: The system provides healthcare navigation, drug availability search, and communication services. It must be used only for lawful and intended purposes.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: Users must provide accurate information during registration. Access to features depends on authentication and assigned roles such as user, pharmacy agent, or administrator.

data.title: 4. Data Privacy
data.content: User data including location and personal information is processed securely and only for system functionality. Data will not be shared without user consent.

chatbot.title: 5. Chatbot Usage
chatbot.content: The chatbot provides general assistance related to pharmacy services and availability. It does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment advice.

inventory.title: 6. Pharmacy Data Responsibility
inventory.content: Pharmacies are responsible for maintaining accurate drug availability and pricing. The system displays data based on the latest updates.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The platform is not liable for incorrect or outdated information provided by pharmacies or hospitals. Users should verify critical information independently.

security.title: 8. Security
security.content: We implement security measures including authentication, encryption, and role-based access to protect system integrity and user data.

termination.title: 9. Account Termination
termination.content: The system reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate policies or misuse the platform.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms
changes.content: These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of the updated terms.

terms.footer: © MedFinder - Smart Hospital & Pharmacy Finder System
